history.text: When is the thesis submission deadline?
The thesis submission deadline is April 15th. [C1]
How do I request a passive semester?
You need to submit the request through the proper university administration workflow. [C1]

scenarios.query: Can I do that after the deadline?

history.text: What are the exam retake rules?
Retake options are defined in the academic regulations and depend on the exam policy. [C1]

scenarios.query: And is there usually a fee?

history.text: Internship completion is mandatory before graduation in the relevant curriculum. [C2]

scenarios.query: Does this apply to MSc as well?

history.text: How can I apply for Erasmus?
Application details are published by the faculty and international office channels. [C3]
Yes, there are recent faculty news updates about opportunities. [C1]
